title: Food Remastered
description: A full rework of all Minecraft food textures with more realistic, detailed 16×16 pixel art — perfect for survival, roleplay, or immersion.
body:
Food Remastered is a complete visual overhaul of Minecraft's food items, staying true to the vanilla style while making each item more realistic and satisfying to look at. Every texture is hand-crafted in 16×16 resolution to fit seamlessly into the game, without straying too far from the original feel.

Whether you’re farming crops, cooking in a roleplay world, or just want better-looking steak, this pack gives every edible item the glow-up it deserves. Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21 and beyond.
Created by BigBraydo.

## Project and Links

Pettalk, my mod (that isnt very good) https://modrinth.com/mod/pettalk

Food Remastered (CurseForge link) https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/food-remastered
